globalNotes.text: Initial release: primitive + semantic tokens, 6 color modes, 4 font families, 3 font scales, 2 density modes
249 primitive tokens (color, font, text, space, border, style)
93 semantic color tokens across 6 modes (Base Light, Base Dark, ResMan Light, ResMan Dark, AnyoneHome Light, Inhabit Light)
Semantic font tokens with 4 font families (Inter, Poppins, Roboto, Lexend)
Semantic font-scale tokens with 3 scales (default, smaller, larger)
Semantic space tokens with 2 density modes (default, comfortable)
Text styles for headings, body, labels, inputs, data cells

Button.text: Primary, secondary, ghost variants; small + default sizes; icon support; disabled + loading states

Icon Wrapper.text: Size and color variants for Material Symbols

Nav Header.text: Navigation system: header bar, vertical sidebar, bento dropdown, rail buttons, search, and account actions

Nav Vertical.text: Navigation system: header bar, vertical sidebar, bento dropdown, rail buttons, search, and account actions

Tabs.text: Horizontal tab component with keyboard navigation

Text Input.text: Label, helper text, error state, character counter, leading/trailing icons

Chip.text: Compact filter/input/dropdown chips with selected state, leading/trailing icons, removable input tags

Data Table.text: Data grid with sortable headers, checkbox selection, badge/action cell types, striped rows, error highlighting

Dialog.text: Modal overlay with title, scrollable body, action footer; backdrop click and Escape to close; 1-4 content slots

Dropdown.text: Single-select dropdown with label, helper text, leading icon, error/disabled states, keyboard navigation

List.text: Vertical list with single-select, optional leading/trailing icons, keyboard navigation; 5 interaction states

Nav Header.text: Standalone header bar with logo, bento dropdown, search, My Work, and account actions
Split Nav into two separate components: Nav Header and Nav Vertical
Replaced by Nav Header and Nav Vertical — update imports to nav-header.css + nav-vertical.css

Nav Vertical.text: Sidebar navigation with two variants: Leading Icons (default) and text-only
Split Nav into two separate components: Nav Header and Nav Vertical
Replaced by Nav Header and Nav Vertical — update imports to nav-header.css + nav-vertical.css

Notification.text: Status banners with info, success, error, warning variants; subtle, prominent, and inline styles; optional dismiss

Search.text: Search input with leading icon, auto-show clear button, hover/focused/error states

Tile.text: Selectable card with label, body text, optional chevron; default/hover/selected/focused/disabled states

Tooltip.text: CSS-only text popover on hover/focus with top/bottom/left/right positioning

globalNotes.text: Semantic icon destructive token (`--uds-color-icon-destructive`) with light-mode red/70 and dark-mode red/50 aliases
Internal support pages checkbox-control, input, and slot were inspected but intentionally kept out of public docs for 0.3

Accessibility — bumped semantic color tokens so all text/surface combinations meet WCAG AA 4.5:1 across ALL 6 supported theme combinations (Base/ResMan/AnyoneHome × Light/Dark + Inhabit Light). Light mode: `text-secondary` (neutral-50→70 = 7.04:1), `text-info` (blue-70→80 = 5.7:1 on subtle), `text-warning` (orange-70→90 = 5.6:1 on subtle), `text-success` (green-70→80 = 4.71:1 on subtle), `surface-warning` (orange-70→80 = 5.21:1 white text), `surface-error` (red-70→80 = 6.71:1), `surface-success` (green-70→80 = 4.83:1), `surface-info` (blue-70→80 = 8.5:1), `surface-interactive-red` (red-70→80 = 6.71:1). Dark mode: `text-secondary` (neutral-70→50 = 9.4:1, was 3.9:1 / failing); `text-info/warning/success/error` all -50→-40 for AA on -100 subtle bg. AnyoneHome (emerald) accent: -70→-90 fill (6.97:1 white text, was 3.45:1). Inhabit (amber) accent: -70→-90 fill (6.06:1 white text, was 2.66:1). All bumps stay within the same color family so visual identity is preserved. button.css palette overrides also switched from primitive-token references to semantic tokens.

Badge.text: Figma variant matrix confirmed: 2 sizes (Default/Small), 5 variants (Info/Secondary/Success/Error/Warning), and Prominent true/false

Fixed invisible text on the secondary prominent variant. The CSS paired `surface-bold` (light gray in light mode) with `text-inverse` (near-white in light mode) — contrast was ~1.07:1, basically invisible. Switched to `text-primary` for a contrast of ~9.7:1 in light mode and ~10:1 in dark mode. Affected the changelog component-name pills and per-component changelog type labels.

Breadcrumb.text: Figma variant matrix confirmed: framed/frameless, depth on/off, 2-6 link groups, current/default/disabled link states, and open-in-new-window affordance

Button.text: Figma variant matrix confirmed for primary/secondary/ghost buttons: destructive true/false, default/small sizes, default/hover/active/selected/disabled states, leading/trailing icons, icon-only, and horizontal/vertical button groups

Checkbox.text: Figma variant matrix confirmed for checkbox and multiline checkbox: selected true/false plus default/hover/active/focused/selected/disabled/error states

Chip.text: Figma variant matrix confirmed: default/filter/input/dropdown variants, selected true/false, and default/hover/active/focused/focused-on-active states

Combobox.text: Placeholder page for searchable text-entry selection component from Figma 0.3

Data Table.text: Figma data-table coverage expanded: text/dropdown/ghost-button/checkbox/badge cell types, header cells, 1-14 columns, 2-14 rows, alignment, leading/trailing icons, dividers, prominent text, and error highlighting

Data View.text: Placeholder page for non-table record collection layouts from Figma 0.3

Date Picker.text: Placeholder page for calendar date-entry component from Figma 0.3

Dialog.text: Figma dialog component supports 1-4 slot configurations plus header and footer subcomponents

Divider.text: Figma divider coverage confirmed for sm, md, lg, and xl padding variants

Dropdown.text: Figma dropdown coverage confirmed: default/disabled/error field states plus dropdown item active/default/focused/hover states

Icon Wrapper.text: Figma icon wrapper coverage confirmed for 16, 20, 24, 32, 48, and 64px sizes

Label.text: Blocked form-control label component with multiline/basic/extended features, default/disabled/error/interactive/success variants, token-first CSS, examples, code, playground, and Demo Builder coverage

Link.text: In-progress navigational link component with default/current page/disabled states, optional open-in-new-window affordance, token-first CSS, examples, code, playground, and Demo Builder coverage

List.text: Figma list coverage confirmed: 1-10 item lists, draggable and non-draggable item variants, leading/trailing icons, and default/hover/active/focused/selected states

Notification.text: Figma notification coverage confirmed: info/success/error/warning variants, inline true/false, and prominent true/false

Pagination.text: Blocked paginated navigation component with default/active states, rows-per-page context, token-first CSS, examples, code, playground, and Demo Builder coverage

Radio.text: Figma radio coverage confirmed: radio button states including selected/error/disabled/hover/active combinations plus 2-5 option radio groups

Search.text: Figma search bar coverage confirmed: default/hover/focused/active/error-active states

Tabs.text: Figma tab coverage confirmed: default/small sizes, 2-6 tab groups, selected and disabled states, plus hover/focus/active-on-selected variants

Text Area.text: Multi-line text-entry component with default/hover/focused/active/error-focused states, token-first CSS, examples, code, playground, and Demo Builder coverage

Text Input.text: Figma text input coverage confirmed: field default/disabled/error states and wrapper default/active/error states

Tile.text: Figma tile coverage confirmed: default/hover/focused/selected/disabled states

Toggle.text: Immediate on/off setting control with active true/false and disabled variants, token-first CSS, examples, code, playground, and Demo Builder coverage
